name: Warriror Ragdoll
description: Ragdoll Soldiers: The Fight Game - is a striking stickman game, stickman soldiers fight game where you can unleash at waves of enemy stickmen soldiers. In order to survive you will have to fight to the last drop of your blood. Show you soldier skills to become a winner in battles. Ragdoll warriors can carry an attack by different body parts and use various types of weapons. Join the battle and fight with stickman warriors now!
